Task.title: Task
Task.description: A daily task representing an item on the checklist with effort and priority levels.

title.description: The title or action of the task.

description.description: Optional detailed notes or description of the task.

completed.description: The status indicating if the task has been finished.

category.description: The custom or preset category the task belongs to.

effort.description: The estimated energy/effort required to complete the task, from 1 to 10.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp representing when the task was created.

favorite.description: Status indicating whether the task is starred or favorited.

FcmToken.title: FcmToken
FcmToken.description: An FCM registration token associated with a client instance to receive push notifications.

token.description: The Firebase Cloud Messaging registration token.

deviceType.description: Device or browser type registering the token.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp representing when the token was registered or updated.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Information tracking the user's points, total XP, and unlocked features/themes.

points.description: The points balance the user has available to spend in the Shop.

totalXp.description: Total XP accumulated over time to determine level.

unlockedItems.description: IDs of items unlocked in the gamification shop.

activeTheme.description: The ID of the theme active for this user.

streak.description: The current productivity streak (number of consecutive days with all tasks completed).

hasGoldenBadge.description: Whether the user has unlocked the Golden Badge (reached a 30-day streak).

tasks/{taskId}.description: The top-level collection containing all user-authored tasks.

fcm_tokens/{tokenId}.description: A collection containing registered client FCM registration tokens for push notifications.

user_profiles/{profileId}.description: A collection tracking gamification metrics per client instance.
